rationale: The cited paper appears as one entry in a broad literature summary table of prior antecedents of risk taking, where many studies are listed together. In the main argument and study design of the citing paper, there is no clear reuse of Mittal et al. (2002)'s framework, measures, mechanism, or findings beyond this background positioning. This indicates a passing background citation rather than a citation with a distinct functional role in the paper's core contribution.
